projects.name: MAGAZIN SAT | E-COMMERCE & REPAIR MANAGEMENT
projects.skills: Next.js 14, React, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind CSS, React Hook Form, Socket.IO, Font Awesome
projects.description: A comprehensive multi-application e-commerce and repair shop management system. Built three interconnected applications: Admin Panel for complete back-office management (stock, sales, POS, repairs, employees, suppliers, treasury), Customer-facing E-commerce store with full shopping experience, and Atelier Panel for repair shop technicians. Features include real-time notifications, role-based permissions, multi-tier pricing, newsletter drag-and-drop editor, Google OAuth, product reviews, and wholesale marchand management.

projects.name: ATOMIC ERP | TECH SOCIETY MANAGEMENT
projects.skills: React, Redux Toolkit, Material-UI, React Router, JWT Authentication, Chart.js
projects.description: A complete ERP system for managing tech society operations. Features include project management, task tracking with status management, real-time messaging between team members, attendance tracking with check-in/check-out, notification system, document management, and role-based access control (admin, boss, employer). Built with a clean, professional UI using Material-UI components.

projects.name: PHARMA NORM | PARAPHARMACY E-COMMERCE
projects.skills: Next.js 15, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, React Hook Form, Zod, Recharts, Socket.IO
projects.description: A modern e-commerce platform for a parapharmacy built with Next.js 15 App Router and TypeScript. Features include product catalog with advanced filtering, shopping cart and checkout flow, customer account management, admin dashboard with KPIs, product/category/order management, inventory tracking, promotional codes, blog/articles management, real-time notifications, PDF/Excel report exports, and responsive design with dark mode support.

projects.name: 2NCODES | BUSINESS MANAGEMENT PLATFORM
projects.skills: React, Redux Toolkit, Material-UI, Chart.js, Recharts, Framer Motion, Socket.IO, Draft.js
projects.description: A comprehensive multi-panel business management platform built with React. Features include advanced dashboard with interactive charts and analytics, rich text editor for content management, PDF generation and export, QR code generation, real-time communication via Socket.IO, date management with pickers, and a responsive multi-panel layout. Built with Redux for state management and Framer Motion for smooth animations.

projects.name: SAUDI WATER AUTHORITY | SECURITY MANAGEMENT APP
projects.skills: React, TypeScript, Material-UI, Redux Toolkit, React Query, Leaflet Maps, Chart.js, i18next, Socket.IO
projects.description: A security management application for the Saudi Water Authority built with React and TypeScript. Features include interactive map integration with Leaflet for location tracking, comprehensive dashboard with data visualization charts, real-time notifications via Socket.IO, multi-language support (i18next) with RTL, form management with React Hook Form, PDF report generation, and role-based access control. Designed for enterprise-level security operations monitoring.

projects.name: ATOMIC IT | COMPANY WEBSITE & ADMIN DASHBOARD
projects.skills: React, Redux, Framer Motion, i18next, Tailwind CSS, React Helmet
projects.description: The official Atomic IT company website with a full-featured admin dashboard. The client-facing website includes multi-language support (English, French, Arabic with RTL), smooth page transitions with Framer Motion, services showcase, project portfolio, blog section, and contact forms. The admin dashboard provides complete CMS capabilities with JWT authentication, content management for services, projects, technologies, team members, blog posts, statistics, and contact submissions.

projects.name: AL ANBAR UNIVERSITY | UNIVERSITY MANAGEMENT SYSTEM
projects.skills: React, Node.js, Express, MySQL, JWT Authentication, SCSS
projects.description: A full-stack university management system for Al Anbar University. The frontend provides a comprehensive interface for students and administrators with course management, student records, scheduling, and academic reporting. Built with React for the client-side and Node.js/Express with MySQL for the backend. Features include secure JWT authentication, responsive design, and client-side routing with proper server configuration.
